---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new traffic profile, security test, or script capability
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A brief description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Use Case

What security testing scenario does this enable? What product or capability would it help validate? (e.g., "would generate realistic VoIP traffic to test Zscaler's application control policies")

## Proposed Behavior

Describe how you envision this working. For traffic profiles, include example domains, user agents, or API endpoints. For security tests, describe the payload type and intended DLP/AV/UEBA trigger.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you worked around this with a manual customization of `lab-traffic.tsv` or a custom script? If so, sharing that would be a great starting point.

## Additional Context

Any relevant Zscaler policy documentation, vendor API references, or other context that would help implement this.
